message:
fix(ci): Use wamrc directly for AOT compilation

edgeboxc doesn't have a 'compile' command. Use WAMR's wamrc
tool directly to compile WASM to AOT:

  vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build/wamrc -o output.aot input.wasm

This fixes the 'Unknown command: compile' error in CI.

files.patch:
@@ -60,8 +60,9 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Compile EdgeBox WASM to AOT
         run: |
-          zig-out/bin/edgeboxc compile zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.wasm \
-            -o zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.aot
+          vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build/wamrc \
+            -o zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.aot \
+            zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.wasm
 
       - name: Build QuickJS-NG
         working-directory: vendor/quickjs-ng
